description: A polling tuning policy has been placed on the desktop at ~/Desktop/polling_tuning_policy.txt. Review the policy. You need to update the global system/polling settings in OpManager to relax monitoring for high-latency WAN links: set Ping Timeout to 5000 milliseconds, Ping Retries to 4, and the default Availability Polling Interval to 15 minutes. Additionally, you must apply aggressive local overrides to two critical datacenter switches: set the Availability Polling Interval for both 'Local-Core-SW-01' (IP 10.0.1.11) and 'Local-Core-SW-02' (IP 10.0.1.12) to exactly 1 minute. If these devices do not exist in the inventory, add them first. Application: http://localhost:8060 (admin/Admin@123).
